certificate_manager_certificates.description: List of SSL certificates to associate with the HTTPS proxy; must be managed by Certificate Manager.

certificate_map.description: Defines the certificate map to be used for SSL certificate management, specifying mappings for HTTPS requests. Must be the name or ID of an existing certificate map in Google Cloud.

description.description: Defines an optional text description for the HTTPS proxy, providing additional context or details about its purpose.

http_keep_alive_timeout_sec.description: Specifies the duration, in seconds, to keep an idle HTTPS connection open for reuse; must be between 1 and 3600.

name.description: Name of the Target HTTPS Proxy, must be unique within the project and comply with RFC1035.

proxy_bind.description: Determines whether the proxy will bind to the IP address specified by the forwarding rule. Must be set to true if global access is enabled.

quic_override.description: Specifies the QUIC protocol policy for the HTTPS proxy. Valid values are 'NONE', 'ENABLE', and 'DISABLE'.

server_tls_policy.description: Specifies the TLS policy for the HTTPS proxy, determining the SSL features and protocols enforced. Must match an existing TLS policy in the same project.

ssl_certificates.description: List of SSL certificate resources to associate with the HTTPS proxy; must be in the same project and region as the proxy.

ssl_policy.description: Specifies the SSL policy to apply to the HTTPS proxy, defining the SSL features and versions supported. Must be the name of an existing SSL policy in the same project.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout duration for operations on the HTTPS proxy, such as creation, update, or deletion.

tls_early_data.description: Enables or disables TLS early data for the HTTPS proxy; requires proper client support and configuration.

url_map.description: Specifies the URL map resource to route requests based on URL patterns. Must be a valid resource name or ID.
